body.text:
Delivery Fees and Service Fees are charged on delivery orders and are separate from the item prices shown on the merchant’s menu and at cart.

Delivery Fee
Varies based on things like your location, the restaurant, the availability of nearby delivery people and whether you are an Uber One member.

Service Fee
Restaurant: varies per order but always between $2.50 and $6.50.
Retail incl. grocery, pharmacy and alcohol: up to 20% of your subtotal but always between $2 and $20.
Convenience: up to 18% of your subtotal but always between $2 and $20, plus a Small Order Service Fee of $2 for convenience if your subtotal is under $15.

Other Fees
Bag fees or other eco-fees may apply if mandated by law or charged by the merchant.
All fees are also visible at checkout.

Learn More: https://z.uber.com/fees
